resources.string: 1. Including letters and numbers, please don\'t set common passwords as anti-phishing codes.\n2. After setting,this code will be included in the email that Allin sent to you; those that do not contain this code are fake or fraudulent emails.
The code will be included in all emails sent by Allin. Don‘t disclose the anti-phishing code to anyone.
Are you sure you want to clear the cache?
Send tokens to a Allin user with zero fees
Send tokens to the recipient\'s address via the blockchain network
Ensure the contract information of the crypto you\'re depositing is the same as the one shown below,otherwise you\'ll lose your assets
· If you send any other crypto except %s-%s to this address,your assets may be at risk of being lost.
· Please check the deposit address carefully.This is the final verification of your deposit.

· Minimum withdrawal amount : %s %s.\n· Please check each other\'s accounts carefully to avoid wrongly causing property loss.\n· Please ensure the safety of your equipment to prevent information from being tampered with or leaked.
System maintenance in progress. %s temporarily unavailable
Select the same network as the %s platform
The withdrawal address format is wrong.Please check the withdrawal address length and character content.
Please type or paste the address
Please enter a note for the address
You will delete this address from your address book.
Please type or paste the address
· Please make sure to check the correct address for withdrawing coins, otherwise the assets will not be recovered
· Please be sure to confirm the security of your computer and browser to prevent information from being tampered with or leaked;
File sharing is not configured for this app
Link copied. Go paste it on the platform!
%1$s won\'t work unless you enable Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device.
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device.
%1$s won\'t run unless you update Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are currently updating.
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Please ensure that you have disposed of all assets in your account. After the account is logged out, no form of service will be provided.

Before you proceed with deleting your account,please read and agree to the following:

Deleting your account is an irreversible action. Please make sure to back up any relevant information or data associated with your account before proceeding. Additionally,ensure that all services related to your All InX account have been appropriately handled prior to deletion.

By Deleting your All InX account,you will no longer be able to use this account or retrieve any associated information,including:
I have read the above content and accepted all consequences that may arise.
Please note that deleting an account does not exempt or reduce any existing actions and related responsibilities of the account.
下载服务不可用,请您启用
下载失败，重定向地址丢失
下载失败，重定向次数过多
下载失败，等待网络连接
您尚未授予应用安装权限，无法更新
Current mode: Repeat all. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat none. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat one. Toggle repeat mode.
Withdrawal will be restricted for 24 hours after changing your password.
Are you sure you want to cancel the open orders on the %s contract?
Don\'t show again. You can reset in [Preference].
Are you sure you want to close all positions on the %s at market price?
Don\'t show again. You can reset in [Preference].
If there is a closing order for the position, the system will first cancel it before proceeding with the market closing.
The estimated liquidation price is calculated based on the risk = 100%. It doesn\'t represent the actual liquidation price and is thus for reference only.

Funding fee = position value * funding rate

Long and short position holders will incur funding fees every 8 hours.If the funding rate is positive after settlement,the longs will pay the shorts. If the funding rate is negative, the shorts will pay the longs.

Note that the funding rate fluctuates in real-time every 8 hours according to market conditions. The position value will be used during settlement to calculate your funding fee.

After you place an order, TP/SL orders will be placed based on the actual amount filled.Canceling the order will automatically cancel any preset TP/SL orders.\n\nIn the event of extreme market fluctuations, the actual price may differ from the TP/SL settings, potentially resulting in some or all orders not being closed.
Selecting higher leverage, such as [10x], increases your liquidation risk. Always manage your risk levels.
Don\'t show again. You can reset in [Preference].
A conditional order is an order with preset trigger price and order price. When the trigger price is reached, the system will automatically place a limit order at the order price.
A limit order is an order to buy or sell at a given price or better. Limit orders are not guaranteed to be executed.
A market order is an order that will be filled at the best available market price immediately.
Mark price is derived from the spot index price and a decaying funding rate.Mark price is used for floating PNL calculations and liquidations.
When %s Price reaches %s , it will trigger Stop Loss Market order to close this position. Estimated PNL will be %s %s. ROE %s%%.

The TP and SL orders apply to the entire position. Once the trigger price is reached, any limit order for closing the position will be automatically cancelled and a market order will be executed instead. Any remaining TP or SL orders for that position will also be cancelled after it has been closed.
When %s Price reaches %s , it will trigger Take Profit Market order to close this position. Estimated PNL will be %s %s. ROE %s%%.
by downloading Google Authenticator app, you confirm that you have read and accepted the Disclaimer

Google Authenticator is a third-party independent authenticator launched by Google Inc. It can provide further security protection for your fund operations (such as withdrawals). When you turn on Google Verification, Google Verification will be used first.
Method 1: After the installation is complete, open the Google Authenticator, select Scan Code, scan the QR code below, you can bind successfully and get the verification code.
Method 2: Open the Google Authenticator, tap「+」, select 「Enter a setup key」and enter your MEME account name and the below key manually to get the code.
不支持的 WebView 组件
Share the wealth and prosper together
For more information please click on the Help Center
sign up and win up to $888 in welcome rewards
I promise that the information provided is my own,and there is no pirating of other people\'s information.

Tips:

(1) Please upload a portrait photo of your ID photo, please make sure that the content of the photo is clearly visible. Submitting this application means that your identity information is true and reliable, and there is no situation of misappropriating other people's information.

(2)Please hold the corresponding ID and take a photo to upload.When focusing, try to ensure that there are only documents and heads in the lens. Make sure that the facial features and the photos are basically the same. Do not cover the face and the contents of the document.
Please select a country or region
You can verify one account only.Please make sure all the information provided is correct before submitting.
Go to your device’s settings to enable the app to use your location in the background
Allow access to your location all the time
Go to your device settings to allow access to your photos
Please allow access to storage to see your photos
Your Android app is now integrated with the Intercom platform
Our bot can answer many common questions
There’s currently no help articles available.
Messages from the team will be shown here
To allow access, go to your device app settings\' permissions menu
Message summary: {summary}, Teammate name: {name}, Message sent time: {sentTime}.
Message summary: {summary}, Teammate name: {name}, Teammate status: {adminStatus}, Message sent time: {sentTime}.
{app_name} needs camera access so that you can take photos and videos. Tap Settings > Permissions, and turn Camera on.
{app_name} needs microphone access so that you can use voice input. Tap Settings > Permissions, and turn Microphone on.
We couldn\'t find any GIFs matching your query
There are no photos on this device
There are currently no tasks available.
Contain links to take an action in this app
Reply notifications from chats in this app
New chat messages sent from this app
That number doesn\'t look quite right
You denied access to your photos
I want to talk to a teammate. I have received an inappropriate message from AI.
Sorry, we couldn’t find any results for that. Try rewording your search.
Send us a message and our bot will reply instantly
Some things failed to load. Try again.
To see your photos you need to allow access to storage
Please select all options that apply
Please enter a valid email address
This question requires at least {response_count} options to be selected
This question requires {response_count} options to be selected
Please select a minimum of {minimum_response_count} and a maximum of {maximum_response_count} options
Please keep answers to a maximum of {character_count} characters
Please ensure answers have a minimum of {character_count} characters
Please enter a valid telephone number
{app_name} typically replies in one business day
{app_name} typically replies in two business days
Tell us what you need help with and our bot will do its best to answer
Thanks! The team will reply in one business day
Thanks! The team will reply in two business days
Thanks! The team will reply as soon as they can
That country code doesn\'t look quite right
That email doesn\'t look quite right
That number doesn\'t look quite right
That number has too many digits
That number is missing a few digits
That number needs a prefix (+ or 00)
The team can help if needed
The team typically replies in a few hours.
The team typically replies in one business day.
The team typically replies in two business days
You will be notified here and via email at
Please reply with the following information and someone will get back to you soon.
Have a question about this ticket?
Replies and ticket updates will be sent to this email
Your tickets will be shown here
Have a question about this issue?
We\'ll pick up your ticket soon
We\'ll notify you once your ticket has an update
Tickets. You have unread ticket updates.
You will receive updates in the Messenger and via email
We need more information from you
Try different keywords or type your full question
Typically replies in one business day
Typically replies in two business days
You can return here anytime to see responses and send updates.
Share some context to help the team respond better and faster.
Thanks for sending that context. To save time later, feel free to add more details now.
They\'ll keep this context in mind
You will be notified here and by email
Scan the QR code to join me at Allin
Date does not match expected pattern: %1$s
Date out of expected year range %1$s - %2$s
Swipe to select a year, or tap to switch back to selecting a day
Scroll to show the next month
Scroll to show the previous month
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
Do you want to close your current position? The order will be submitted at the market price to close your position
To protect your assets, the withdrawal function will be suspended for 24 hours after you have changed the login password.
Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s
Tap to switch to Calendar view
Tap to switch to year view
Download the update package SDCard card read and write permissions
SDCard card write permission is required to save pictures
Only %s Genesis Slots Available Worldwide — Choose from Three Plans, First Come First Served!
Successfully invite partners to participate in the Genesis space, you will immediately receive a reward of 10% of their investment amount, and the reward will be paid to your account in one lump sum.

Participate in the All InX Nexus early bird plan, invite partners to co-create, and you will receive a referral reward. The early bird quota is limited and will be available on a first-come, first-served basis.

The development of All InX Nexus is inseparable from the support of every early co-builder. We encourage you to invite partners to join the RWA Genesis Plan to jointly promote ecological prosperity and share future value growth.
Invite and get rewards, seize the opportunity
Invite partners to participate in the All InX Nexus early bird plan and enjoy it immediately 10% reward, share opportunities and win the future together.
Early Bird users enjoy an exclusive subscription price of ANT = 0.1 USDT. Compared to the listing price of 1 USDT, this offers a potential 10x upside.

The maximum ANT subscription quota is determined based on your selected Genesis Slot plan and staking duration. The longer the term, the higher the quota — helping you acquire more tokens at the lowest cost.
Within the allocated subscription quota, users are free to decide the actual amount to subscribe, allowing flexible investment control.
Subscribed ANT will be released in 6 equal installments, with each installment every 6 months.
In each period, the quota is released linearly every day according to the total amount released in the current period, which is stable and orderly.

All InX Nexus is a global RWA full-chain AI smart asset management platform. It maps real assets such as gold, securities, and IP property rights to the chain at a 1:1 ratio, and uses AI algorithms to achieve all-weather profit optimization and risk hedging.
Greater than the maximum amount available for purchase
Less than the minimum amount available for purchase
The subscribed %s will be released in %s equal installments, spaced %s months apart, credited in an orderly manner to ensure steady value growth.
I have read and agreed with User Agreement
To protect your assets, the withdrawal function will be suspended for 24 hours after you have changed the email.
To protect your assets, the withdrawal function will be suspended for 24 hours after you have changed the phone number.

All InX does not provide services or products to users in certain jurisdictions, including North Korea, Cuba, Mainland China, Malaysia, and any other jurisdictions that we may unilaterally decide to restrict from time to time (Restricted Jurisdictions). If you become a resident of any Restricted Jurisdiction or are aware of any user located there, you must notify us immediately. You understand and acknowledge that if you misrepresent your place of residence, the company has the right to take any appropriate action under this policy or the relevant law of such jurisdiction, including immediate account termination and closure of any open positions. The platform reserves the right to take such actions accordingly.
Are you sure you want to cancel %s orders?
Don\'t show again. You can reset in [Preference].
Don\'t show again. You can reset in [Preference].
A limit order is an order to buy or sell at a given price or better. Limit orders are not guaranteed to be executed.
A market order is an order that will be filled at the best available market price immediately.
Based on the deposit amount and the selected period, the highest ANT (platform currency) private placement quota is allocated
%s%s single currency pledge to obtain Genesis %s permanent qualification (limit %s names)

1.Nickname can be changed only once with 24h.
2.Don't use your name or contact or any other info that may compromise your privacy.
3.Nickname should comply with laws and respect others. Allin reserves the rights to change your nickname or mute or even block your account if it is found violating rules.
4.Nickname should be within 24 characters long,allowing for letters, numbers.Special characters are not allowed.
1.Make sure you typed your email correctly.\n2.Check your spam folder.\n3.Give it a few minutes.There might have been a delay.
If you still haven\'t received your code, contact Allin customer service.
Have you tried the following steps?
The installation package is already downloading
